name: Simple HTTP Server
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl && echo "from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler; class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler): def do_GET(self): self.send_response(200); self.send_header(\"Content-type\", \"text/plain\"); self.end_headers(); self.wfile.write(b\"Hello from DevPod\"); HTTPServer((\"\", 8080), Handler).serve_forever()" > /tmp/server.py'
